name: Minimalism & Swiss Style
description: Strict grids, clean typography, abundant whitespace. No unnecessary decoration.
cssHints: font-family: Helvetica, sans-serif; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.6;

name: Neumorphism
description: Soft inner/outer shadows simulating extrusion on uniform light backgrounds.
cssHints: box-shadow: 8px 8px 16px #d1d1d1, -8px -8px 16px #ffffff; border-radius: 16px; background: #e0e0e0;

name: Glassmorphism
description: Frosted glass effect with blur and transparency over colorful backgrounds.
cssHints: backdrop-filter: blur(10px); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius: 16px;

name: Brutalism
description: Raw, unpolished. Thick borders, vivid colors, large type, anti-convention.
cssHints: border: 3px solid #000; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase;

name: 3D & Hyperrealism
description: Three-dimensional elements, realistic textures, depth through shadows and perspective.
cssHints: transform: perspective(1000px) rotateY(-5deg); box-shadow: 0 25px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);

name: Vibrant & Block-based
description: Bold color blocks, strong geometric shapes, high saturation.
cssHints: background: #FF6B35; color: #fff; padding: 2rem; border-radius: 0;

name: Dark Mode (OLED)
description: Pure black backgrounds with vivid accents. Maximum contrast for OLED displays.
cssHints: background: #000000; color: #e5e5e5; --accent: #3b82f6;

name: Accessible & Ethical
description: WCAG AAA compliant, high contrast, clear hierarchy, inclusive by default.
cssHints: font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.8; color: #1a1a1a; background: #ffffff;

name: Claymorphism
description: Clay-like 3D elements with soft pastel colors and inner shadows.
cssHints: background: #f0e6ff; border-radius: 24px; box-shadow: inset 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 8px 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);

name: Aurora UI
description: Northern lights inspired gradients on dark backgrounds with ethereal colors.
cssHints: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0c0c1d, #1a0533, #0d2137); --glow: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(120,80,255,0.3), transparent);

name: Retro-Futurism
description: 80s retro mixed with futuristic. Neons, grids, saturated colors on dark.
cssHints: background: #0a0a2e; color: #ff00ff; text-shadow: 0 0 10px #ff00ff; font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace;

name: Flat Design
description: Zero shadows, zero gradients. Solid colors, simple icons, clean typography.
cssHints: box-shadow: none; border-radius: 4px; background: #2196F3; color: #fff;

name: Skeuomorphism
description: Realistic textures and materials mimicking physical objects.
cssHints: background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f5f5dc, #e5e5cc); border: 1px solid #ccc; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.5);

name: Liquid Glass
description: Fluid, liquid surfaces with reflections, distortions, dynamic transparency.
cssHints: backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(1.5); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 24px;

name: Motion-Driven
description: Animation IS the design. Scroll-triggered, fluid transitions, micro-interactions.
cssHints: transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); animation: fadeInUp 0.6s ease-out;

name: Micro-interactions
description: Focus on small, delightful interactions. Hover states, toggles, feedback animations.
cssHints: transition: transform 0.2s ease; &:hover { transform: scale(1.02); } &:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

name: Inclusive Design
description: Designed for the full range of human diversity. Multiple input modes, flexible layouts.
cssHints: font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.25rem); touch-action: manipulation; min-height: 44px;

name: Zero Interface
description: The best interface is no interface. Voice, gesture, ambient computing.
cssHints: /* minimal visual UI, focus on conversational/voice patterns */

name: Soft UI Evolution
description: Evolved neumorphism. More subtle, better contrast, improved accessibility.
cssHints: box-shadow: 6px 6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), -6px -6px 12px rgba(255,255,255,0.8); border-radius: 12px;

name: Neubrutalism
description: Softened brutalism. Hard drop shadows, black borders, bright pastels.
cssHints: border: 2px solid #000; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #000; border-radius: 8px; background: #FFE566;

name: Bento Box Grid
description: Apple-style irregular grid. Cards of different sizes, controlled asymmetry.
cssHints: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 16px; grid-template-rows: auto;

name: Y2K Aesthetic
description: Bubble shapes, chrome, iridescent colors, organic forms, 2000s nostalgia.
cssHints: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff9a9e, #fad0c4, #a18cd1); border-radius: 50%; filter: blur(0.5px);

name: Cyberpunk UI
description: Neons, glitch effects, HUD elements, tech dystopian aesthetic.
cssHints: background: #0d0d0d; color: #00ff41; text-shadow: 0 0 5px #00ff41; font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;

name: Organic Biophilic
description: Natural forms, earth colors, organic textures, soft curves.
cssHints: border-radius: 32px; background: #f5f0e8; color: #3d3424; font-family: 'Lora', serif;

name: AI-Native UI
description: Interfaces designed around AI interactions. Streaming text, adaptive layouts, conversational.
cssHints: /* streaming text animation, adaptive containers, typing indicators */

name: Memphis Design
description: Geometric, colorful, patterned, anti-minimalist, playful and bold.
cssHints: background: #FF6B6B; color: #2D3436; border: 3px dashed #000; transform: rotate(-2deg);

name: Vaporwave
description: Pastels, gradients, 90s internet aesthetics, grids, surreal imagery.
cssHints: background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ff71ce, #01cdfe, #05ffa1); color: #fff; font-family: 'VT323', monospace;

name: Dimensional Layering
description: Explicit Z-axis depth. Parallax, multiple shadow layers, floating elements.

name: Exaggerated Minimalism
description: Minimalism pushed to the extreme. One color, one font, maximum space.
cssHints: background: #fafafa; color: #111; font-size: 4rem; letter-spacing: -0.04em; padding: 15vh 10vw;

name: Kinetic Typography
description: Typography that moves. Text animations as the primary design element.
cssHints: animation: slideUp 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); overflow: hidden;

name: Parallax Storytelling
description: Narrative through scroll. Layers moving at different speeds.
cssHints: background-attachment: fixed; transform: translateZ(-1px) scale(2);

name: Swiss Modernism 2.0
description: Classic Swiss style modernized with color and motion. Grids + personality.
cssHints: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr); gap: 24px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif;

name: HUD / Sci-Fi FUI
description: Heads-up display interface. Circles, grids, data visualization, futuristic.
cssHints: border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,255,0.3); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.8); color: #00ffff; font-family: 'Rajdhani', sans-serif;

name: Pixel Art
description: Retro gaming aesthetic. Visible pixels, limited palette, 8-bit nostalgia.
cssHints: image-rendering: pixelated; font-family: 'Press Start 2P', monospace; font-size: 8px;

name: Bento Grids
description: Variation of Bento Box with emphasis on content variety within grid cells.
cssHints: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); grid-auto-rows: minmax(200px, auto); gap: 12px;

name: Spatial UI (VisionOS)
description: Apple Vision Pro style. Glass materials, depth, floating layers, subtle blur.
cssHints: backdrop-filter: blur(40px) saturate(1.2); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 24px; border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);

name: E-Ink / Paper
description: Paper-like appearance. Low contrast, paper textures, editorial typography.
cssHints: background: #f4f1ea; color: #333; font-family: 'Literata', serif; line-height: 1.8;

name: Gen Z Chaos / Maximalism
description: Everything at once. Clashing colors, mixed fonts, collage, maximum energy.
cssHints: background: #FF00FF; color: #00FF00; font-size: 6rem; mix-blend-mode: difference; transform: rotate(3deg);

name: Biomimetic / Organic 2.0
description: Advanced organic design. Nature-inspired algorithms, generative patterns.
cssHints: border-radius: 30% 70% 70% 30% / 30% 30% 70% 70%; background: #e8f5e9;

name: Anti-Polish / Raw Aesthetic
description: Intentionally unpolished. Authentic, underground, no finish.
cssHints: font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; border: 1px dashed #666; background: #fafafa;

name: Tactile Digital / Deformable UI
description: Elements that react to touch. Deformation, elasticity, physics-based.
cssHints: transition: transform 0.15s ease; &:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

name: Nature Distilled
description: Nature abstracted into design. Earth colors, simplified organic forms.
cssHints: background: #faf6f0; color: #4a3728; border-radius: 16px; font-family: 'Prata', serif;

name: Interactive Cursor Design
description: Custom cursor as design element. Trails, effects, hover interactions.
cssHints: cursor: none; /* custom cursor via JS */

name: Voice-First Multimodal
description: Voice as primary input with visual feedback. Ambient, minimal chrome.
cssHints: /* minimal visual, focus on audio feedback and visual pulse indicators */

name: 3D Product Preview
description: Interactive 3D product visualization. Rotation, zoom, configuration.
cssHints: /* Three.js or model-viewer web component */

name: Gradient Mesh / Aurora Evolved
description: Complex multi-color gradient meshes. Organic, immersive, evolved aurora.
cssHints: background: conic-gradient(from 45deg, #ff6b6b, #feca57, #48dbfb, #ff9ff3, #ff6b6b);

name: Editorial Grid / Magazine
description: Magazine layout. Multi-column, pull quotes, full-bleed images, editorial type.
cssHints: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr 1fr; gap: 32px; font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;

name: Chromatic Aberration / RGB Split
description: RGB color channel splitting effect. Glitch-inspired, cyber aesthetic.
cssHints: text-shadow: 2px 0 #ff0000, -2px 0 #00ffff;

name: Vintage Analog / Retro Film
description: Film grain, desaturated colors, retro typography, analog nostalgia.
cssHints: filter: sepia(0.1) contrast(1.05); background: #f5f0e8; font-family: 'Courier Prime', monospace;

name: Hero-Centric Design
description: Massive full-screen hero taking all attention. Scroll reveals the rest.
cssHints: min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

name: Conversion-Optimized
description: Every element oriented toward conversion. Visible CTA, minimal friction.
cssHints: /* prominent CTA, social proof near fold, minimal distractions */

name: Feature-Rich Showcase
description: Each feature gets its own detailed section with demo or screenshot.
cssHints: display: grid; gap: 4rem; padding: 4rem 0; /* alternating image/text layout */

name: Minimal & Direct
description: Direct message, few sections, immediate CTA. No fluff.
cssHints: max-width: 640px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center; padding: 4rem 2rem;

name: Social Proof-Focused
description: Testimonials, reviews, case studies as the core content.
cssHints: /* testimonial cards grid, star ratings, client logos, video testimonials */

name: Interactive Product Demo
description: Live demo in the hero. User can try before signing up.
cssHints: /* embedded demo iframe or interactive component */

name: Trust & Authority
description: Certifications, logos, case studies, security badges. Credibility first.
cssHints: /* badge grid, partner logos in grayscale, certification icons */

name: Storytelling-Driven
description: Progressive narrative. Hero → problem → solution → proof → CTA.
cssHints: scroll-snap-type: y mandatory; /* section-by-section reveal */

name: Data-Dense Dashboard
description: Maximum information density. Tight grids, small type, many widgets.
cssHints: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 8px; font-size: 12px;

name: Heat Map & Heatmap Style
description: Color intensity represents data values. Calendars, matrices, geographic.
cssHints: /* color scale from green to red, matrix grid layout */

name: Executive Dashboard
description: Few KPIs, clear and large. High-level view for decision makers.
cssHints: font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 200; display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2rem;

name: Real-Time Monitoring
description: Live data, auto-updates, alerts, status indicators.
cssHints: /* live updating values, status dots, sparklines, alert badges */

name: Drill-Down Analytics
description: Overview → click → detail. Navigate through data layers.
cssHints: /* breadcrumb nav, expandable rows, detail panels */

name: Comparative Analysis Dashboard
description: Side-by-side comparisons, benchmarks, deltas, trend lines.
cssHints: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; /* delta indicators, comparison charts */

name: Predictive Analytics
description: Forecasts, projections, confidence intervals, ML model outputs.
cssHints: /* forecast lines with confidence bands, scenario toggles */

name: User Behavior Analytics
description: Funnels, heatmaps, user journeys, retention curves, cohort analysis.
cssHints: /* funnel visualization, retention matrix, session replay */

name: Financial Dashboard
description: P&L, cash flow, burn rate, runway. Precision and trust.
cssHints: font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; /* green for positive, red for negative, aligned decimals */

name: Sales Intelligence Dashboard
description: Pipeline visualization, deal stages, performance by rep, forecasts.
cssHints: /* kanban pipeline, bar charts by rep, conversion rates */
